meta.setting: French Gulch streets, store alleys, jail doors, ore sheds, and shuttered rooms after dark
meta.rdr_clone_target: RDR-clone western with law heat, town stealth, reputation, paid authority, and hard choices

research_grounding.title: California State Parks Shasta State Historic Park
research_grounding.use: Northern California mining-town buildings, iron shutters, courthouse memory, commerce, and street texture.

research_grounding.title: NPS Whiskeytown History and Culture
research_grounding.use: Gold rush communities, mining towns, and regional settlement pressure.

generation_prompt.task: Generate the Night Watchmen cast page for the 1899 Jefferson State western packet. This JSON contains shape and guidance only.
page_shape: square image reference immediately after the title
opening blockquote with invented patrol note, lamp warning, or alley saying generated later
H2 archetype subtitle in the register of Lamp and Shotgun Men
one or two compact lore paragraphs introducing town watchers who guard stores, jail doors, ore sheds, and secrets after the lamps go down
H3 Role with a short table-facing function phrase
H3 Traits with two to four terse signs or habits
10 H4 headings, each followed later by a brief playable move, leverage, cost, edge, or complication
H3 Camp Say closing blockquote with plain meaning generated later
generation_guidance: Generate night watchmen as half-law, half-hired caution, with loyalties determined by who pays, who feeds them, and who knows where they sleep.
Tie future moves to patrol routes, lamp signals, locked doors, jail keys, store alleys, ore sheds, suspicious noise, and choosing not to see.
Make fatigue, boredom, reputation, and small-town fear matter more than badge authority.
Let them be useful contacts, unreliable witnesses, paid obstacles, and people who know every cough behind every wall.
Do not include final move names or final move text in this JSON.
generation_prompt.hand_cut_note: They should know every cough behind every wall but still miss the one thing that matters. At night, law is a lamp circle with darkness all around it.
generation_prompt.table_spark: A night-watch scene should ask who owns the key, who paid for silence, and what the lamp did not reach.
must_preserve: Keep authority human, paid, tired, and fallible.
The generated page must include image path images/night-watchmen.jpg.
No finished page prose, final moves, or final sayings belong in this prompt file.
avoid: do not mention any prior packet, inherited taxonomy, or non-western source language
do not include medieval, enchanted, sacred, or fake-tribal framing
do not make watchmen omniscient or purely villainous
do not use modern slang, electric flashlights, modern police gear, vehicles, or clean theme-park staging
self_check: The future markdown follows the exact heading sequence.
The future page is about night patrols, keys, witnesses, paid authority, and table action.
The prompt contains no finished page prose.
All language belongs to grounded 1899 Jefferson State western play.
